Author: SunnysOfficial
Name: Venue Mapper
Description: A Dalamud plugin for discovering FFXIV venues with 2D/3D interactive markers, live events, and built-in owner tools. Your complete FFXIV venue guide.
Changelog:
## What's Changed in v0.5.0:

 Complete rewrite with RESX-based localization (Crowdin-ready)
 Easy Setup Screen on first plugin launch
 Datacenter & Server cascading dropdown system
 Live event tracking with full venue information from Partake API
 ETag polling for automatic GitHub config updates (hourly, non-blocking)
 Google Form integration with auto-fill for venue submissions
 Complete UI polish and refinements
 Full EN/DE localization support (ready for FR/JP via Crowdin)
 Performance optimizations
 Multiple bug fixes and stability improvements

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/SunnysTTV/VenueMapperXIV/releases/tag/v0.5.0
